arts.ttl: Man United eye Matheus Cunha but must sell before being able to afford Wolves' asking price for 15-goal star
arts.sum: Manchester United are on a long list of Premier League clubs who are interested in signing 25-year-old Brazilian forward Matheus Cunha from Wolves this summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United given clear instruction to seal £60m transfer 'worth every penny'
arts.sum: The England youth international is under contract until the summer of 2027, which is in part the reason behind their hefty asking price, while former Saints boss Russell Martin has also told interested parties why Dibling would be worth that figure and what they need to give to sign him. Newcastle United will be among the clubs keeping a keen eye on developments on the south coast this summer following Southampton's relegation from the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'step up scouting' of £40m goalkeeper after Andre Onana horror show
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing up a summer swoop for Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki, with current shot-stopper Andre Onana under pressure at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 32 Scout Picks: Newcastle + Palace triple-ups
arts.sum: Our chosen XI and subs for the upcoming Gameweek The post FPL Gameweek 32 Scout Picks: Newcastle + Palace triple-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro makes true Andre Onana feelings clear after latest Manchester United mistakes
arts.sum: The latest Man United news following a 2-2 draw against Lyon - in which Andre Onana was at fault for both goals.

arts.ttl: I psyched out Man United star 18 months after I worked him out on training ground
arts.sum: Jack Butland was the hero for Rangers in their Europa League shootout win over Fenerbahce last month, and the goalkeeper has now revealed how he psyched out Fred

arts.ttl: Man United launch investigation after fans accused French police of tear-gassing them following 2-2 draw in Lyon
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking into allegations that supporters were tear-gassed by French police after their 2-2 draw with Lyon in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Zola praises €90m Chelsea and Man Utd target: 'He has my qualities'
arts.sum: Chelsea legend Gianfranco Zola has revealed that Serie A stars Kenan Yildiz and Dan Ndoye remind him of himself as they continue to play themselves into the spotlight. Now, both Serie A stars have received big praise from Chelsea legend Gianfranco Zola, who was asked by Tuttomercatoweb to name the current players who most remind him of himself.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd Want to Sign ‘Sensational’ No.10 Alongside Liam Delap
arts.sum: Sources: Man Utd want to sign Wolves star Matheus Cunha as a No.10 this summer, alongside their pursuit of striker Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana faces being DROPPED for Man Utd's trip to Newcastle as Ruben Amorim gets tough
arts.sum: Andre Onana had a night to forget for Manchester United in their 2-2 draw at Lyon, and now he could play for that with his place in the team at Newcastle
